intro: Alpinia officinarum tincture, also known as lesser galangal, is a traditional herbal remedy derived from the rhizome of the Alpinia officinarum plant. The tincture is often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate cold and flu symptoms. However, it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Alpinia officinarum tincture, as it may interact with certain medications or exacerbate underlying health conditions.
